seoTitle: Manchester Square vs Mandagery — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Manchester Square and Mandagery. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Manchester Square vs Mandagery: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Manchester Square and Mandagery.
heading: Manchester Square vs Mandagery — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Manchester Square, New South Wales and Mandagery, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Manchester Square has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mandagery (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Manchester Square or Mandagery safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Manchester Square has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Mandagery scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Manchester Square scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Mandagery scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Manchester Square or Mandagery?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Manchester Square has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
